parameters.sqlQuery:
WITH configured_fees AS (
  SELECT
    pc.account_id,
    pc.account_name,
    pc.plan_name,
    pc.plan_value AS configured_fee,
    pc.charge_model,
    pc.subscription_name
  FROM `guesty-data.zuora_analytics.product_catalog` pc
  WHERE LOWER(pc.plan_name) LIKE '%payment gateway%'
    AND pc.effective_end_date > CURRENT_DATE()
),
invoiced_fees AS (
  SELECT
    ii.mongo_account_id,
    ii.subscription_name,
    ii.product_name,
    SUM(ii.amount) AS total_invoiced
  FROM `guesty-data.zuora_analytics.invoice_items` ii
  JOIN `guesty-data.zuora_analytics.invoices` inv
    ON ii.invoice_id = inv.invoice_id
  WHERE ii.invoiceitem_servicestartdate >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
    AND inv.zuora_invoice_status = 'Posted'
    AND LOWER(ii.product_name) LIKE '%payment gateway%'
  GROUP BY ii.mongo_account_id, ii.subscription_name, ii.product_name
)
SELECT
  cf.account_id,
  cf.account_name,
  cf.plan_name,
  cf.configured_fee,
  IFNULL(inf.total_invoiced, 0) AS total_invoiced,
  ROUND(IFNULL(inf.total_invoiced, 0) - cf.configured_fee, 4) AS delta
FROM configured_fees cf
LEFT JOIN invoiced_fees inf
  ON cf.account_id = inf.mongo_account_id
  AND cf.subscription_name = inf.subscription_name
WHERE ROUND(IFNULL(inf.total_invoiced, 0) - cf.configured_fee, 4) != 0
ORDER BY ABS(ROUND(IFNULL(inf.total_invoiced, 0) - cf.configured_fee, 4)) DESC
LIMIT 200
